common.title: DevTools Suite
common.description: Modern developer tools for everyday tasks.

home.heading: Developer Tools
home.subheading: Simple, fast, and secure tools for your development workflow.
home.no_results_desc: We couldn't find any tools matching your search or filters.

base64_encode.name: Base64 Encode
base64_encode.description: Encode text strings into Base64 format safely.

base64_decode.name: Base64 Decode
base64_decode.description: Decode Base64 strings back into readable text.

binary_encode.name: Binary Encode
binary_encode.description: Encode text strings into Binary format (0s and 1s).

binary_decode.name: Binary Decode
binary_decode.description: Decode Binary strings back into readable text.

hex_encode.name: Hex Encode
hex_encode.description: Encode text strings into Hexadecimal format.

hex_decode.name: Hex Decode
hex_decode.description: Decode Hexadecimal strings back into readable text.

url_encode.name: URL Encode
url_encode.description: Safely encode text strings for use in URLs.

url_decode.name: URL Decode
url_decode.description: Decode URL-encoded strings back into readable text.

html_encode.name: HTML Encode
html_encode.description: Convert special characters into HTML entities safely.

html_decode.name: HTML Decode
html_decode.description: Decode HTML entities back into readable text.

md5.name: MD5 Hash
md5.description: Generate MD5 message digests (Not secure for passwords).

bcrypt.name: Bcrypt Hash
bcrypt.description: Secure password hashing with adaptive cost factor.

pbkdf2.name: PBKDF2 Hash
pbkdf2.description: Key derivation function using multiple HMAC iterations.

hmac_sha1.name: HMAC SHA1
hmac_sha1.description: Generate a Hash-based Message Authentication Code using SHA1.

hmac_sha256.name: HMAC SHA256
hmac_sha256.description: Generate a Hash-based Message Authentication Code using SHA256.

hmac_sha512.name: HMAC SHA512
hmac_sha512.description: Generate a Hash-based Message Authentication Code using SHA512.

json_formatter.name: JSON Formatter
json_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your JSON data easily.

js_formatter.name: JS Formatter
js_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your JavaScript code.

ts_formatter.name: TS Formatter
ts_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your TypeScript code.

xml_formatter.name: XML Formatter
xml_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your XML documents.

html_formatter.name: HTML Formatter
html_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your HTML code.

css_formatter.name: CSS Formatter
css_formatter.description: Clean, format, and minify your CSS stylesheets.

json_to_go.name: JSON to Go Struct
json_to_go.description: Convert JSON objects into Go struct definitions instantly.

pkcs_p1.name: PKCS#1 Generator
pkcs_p1.description: Generate RSA key pair in PKCS#1 format (PEM).

pkcs_p7.name: PKCS#7 Container
pkcs_p7.description: Create a dummy PKCS#7 signed message container.

pkcs_p8.name: PKCS#8 Generator
pkcs_p8.description: Generate Private key in PKCS#8 format (PEM).

asn1.name: ASN.1 Inspector
asn1.description: Decode and visualize ASN.1 structures from DER or Base64.

jose.name: JOSE (JWT/JWK)
jose.description: Generate and verify JSON Web Tokens and Keys.

cose.name: COSE (CBOR)
cose.description: Encode and sign CBOR Object Signing and Encryption structures.

spki.name: SPKI Formatter
spki.description: Convert and format Subject Public Key Info structures.
